text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm rounding a corner...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh no, oh no, oh no! L-look out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I was in such a huge<n>rush that I—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, right! Sorry, but I made a promise,<n>so I'll be—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I completely forgot that I promised to<n>race with
my friend, so I'm rushing<n>over there now...
choice_data_list:
Then you should probably save that energy for
the race.

Then you should probably save that energy for
the race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I give it my all now, I'll be out of<n>energy when
it's time for the real race<n>with my friend!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty, I'll just jog slowly in the<n>hallway to
recover my strength!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Got it! Thanks, and I'm sorry for<n>crashing into
you! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Special Week runs off again in a<n>panic,
however...
